The following events took place in '''3952 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Conclave at Katarr|Conclave]] on [[Katarr/Legends|Katarr]] is destroyed.<ref name="Jedi vs Sith">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref>
*[[Visas Marr]] joins the [[Sith Triumvirate]] by becoming [[Darth Nihilus]]'s [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]].<ref name="KotorII" />

==Battles==
*[[Conclave at Katarr|Devastation of Katarr]]<ref name="Jedi vs Sith" />

==Deaths==
*[[Dorak]] on [[Katarr/Legends|Katarr]]<ref name="KotorII" />
*[[Zhar Lestin]] on [[Katarr/Legends|Katarr]]<ref name="KotorII" />
*[[Vandar Tokare]] on [[Katarr/Legends|Katarr]]<ref name="KotorII" />

==Appearances==
